metadata.description: Official Elastic agent skills for Elasticsearch, Kibana, Observability, Security, and Cloud

plugins.name: elastic-elasticsearch
plugins.description: Elasticsearch skills — ES|QL queries, data ingestion, security (authn, authz, audit), and troubleshooting

plugins.name: elastic-kibana
plugins.description: Kibana skills — dashboards, alerting rules, connectors, Vega visualizations, Agent Builder, streams, and audit logging

plugins.name: elastic-observability
plugins.description: Elastic Observability skills — OpenTelemetry instrumentation and migration (.NET, Java, Python), LLM observability, log search, SLOs, and service health

plugins.name: elastic-security
plugins.description: Elastic Security skills — alert triage, case management, detection rule management, and sample data generation

plugins.name: elastic-cloud
plugins.description: Elastic Cloud skills — project setup, access management, network security, and Serverless project lifecycle
